questions.question: What is the only legal way actors interact in AutoGen v0.4?
questions.questionZh: 在 AutoGen v0.4 中，参与者 (Actors) 交互的唯一合法方式是什么？
options: Direct access to a shared dict
Asynchronous messages exchanged through inboxes; no shared memory
optionsZh: 直接访问共享字典 (shared dict)
通过邮箱（Inboxes）交换的异步消息（Asynchronous Messages）；无共享内存（Shared Memory）
共享 SQL 事务 (Shared SQL Transactions)
questions.explanation: Actors have private state and an inbox; messages are the only interaction.
questions.explanationZh: 参与者（Actor）拥有私有状态和邮箱（inbox）；消息是唯一的交互方式。

questions.question: What are the three API layers of AutoGen v0.4?
questions.questionZh: AutoGen v0.4 的三个 API 层分别是什么？
questions.explanation: Core is the low-level actor framework, AgentChat is the task-driven high-level API, Extensions are integrations.
questions.explanationZh: 核心（Core）是底层 Actor 框架（Actor Framework），AgentChat 是任务驱动的高级 API（API），扩展（Extensions）则是各类集成（Integrations）。

questions.question: Why does decoupling delivery from handling give fault isolation?
questions.questionZh: 为什么将交付（Delivery）与处理（Handling）解耦（Decoupling）能够实现故障隔离（Fault Isolation）？
options: The runtime catches handler failures in B without crashing A; A's send() returned immediately and never blocked
Each actor runs on a separate machine
The runtime restarts the OS on failure
optionsZh: 运行时（runtime）会捕获 B 中的处理程序（handler）故障，而不会导致 A 崩溃；A 的 send() 会立即返回，且永远不会阻塞。
每个参与者（Actor）运行在独立的机器上。
发生故障时，运行时 (Runtime) 将重启操作系统 (OS)。
questions.explanation: send() puts the message in the recipient's inbox and returns; a handler crash is local to that actor.
questions.explanationZh: `send()` 会将消息放入接收方的收件箱（inbox）并立即返回；处理器（handler）的崩溃仅局限于该 Actor（actor）内部。

questions.question: Which AgentChat topology rotates agents in a fixed order?
questions.questionZh: 哪种 AgentChat 拓扑结构 (topology) 会按固定顺序轮换智能体 (agent)？
questions.explanation: RoundRobinGroupChat is fixed rotation; SelectorGroupChat uses a selector to pick next.
questions.explanationZh: RoundRobinGroupChat 采用固定轮转机制；SelectorGroupChat 则使用选择器（selector）来指定下一个智能体。

questions.question: What is Magentic-One in this lesson?
options: A reference multi-agent team for web browsing, code execution, and file handling built on AgentChat
optionsZh: 一个全新的大语言模型 (Large Language Model)
基于 AgentChat 构建的参考多智能体团队 (Multi-Agent Team)，用于网页浏览 (Web Browsing)、代码执行 (Code Execution) 和文件处理 (File Handling)。
questions.explanation: Magentic-One is Microsoft's reference team that demonstrates the AgentChat API.
questions.explanationZh: Magentic-One 是微软的参考团队 (reference team)，用于演示 AgentChat 接口 (AgentChat API)。

questions.question: What is the lesson's stated status of AutoGen v0.4 in early 2026?
questions.questionZh: 该课程中明确指出的 AutoGen v0.4 在 2026 年初的状态是什么？
options: Stable but in maintenance mode; Microsoft Agent Framework is the forward path
optionsZh: 状态稳定，但已进入维护模式（maintenance mode）；微软智能体框架（Microsoft Agent Framework）是后续的推荐演进路径（forward path）。
questions.explanation: AutoGen v0.7.x is stable for research; active development has shifted to Microsoft Agent Framework.
questions.explanationZh: AutoGen v0.7.x 版本在研究场景中已保持稳定；当前的活跃开发工作已转移至微软智能体框架 (Microsoft Agent Framework)。

questions.question: Which observability standard does AutoGen v0.4 emit by default?
questions.questionZh: AutoGen v0.4 默认采用哪种可观测性标准 (Observability Standard)？
options: OpenTelemetry spans with gen_ai.* attributes per the OTel GenAI semantic conventions
optionsZh: 遵循 OTel GenAI 语义约定 (semantic conventions) 且带有 gen_ai.* 属性 (attribute) 的 OpenTelemetry 跨度 (span)
questions.explanation: Every message emits a span; tool calls carry gen_ai.* attributes per OTel GenAI conventions.
questions.explanationZh: 每条消息都会生成一个跨度 (span)；工具调用 (tool calls) 会遵循 OpenTelemetry 生成式 AI (OTel GenAI) 规范携带 `gen_ai.*` 属性。
